name: FloatingIndicator
description: Display a floating indicator over a group of elements
searchText: floatingindicator display a floating indicator over a group of elements @mantine/core /core/floating-indicator displayaftertransitionend ontransitionend ontransitionstart parent target transitionduration

props.name: displayAfterTransitionEnd
props.description: Controls whether the indicator should be hidden initially and displayed after the parent's transition ends. Set to true when the parent container has CSS transitions (e.g., transform: scale()) to prevent the indicator from appearing at the wrong position during the parent's animation.

props.name: onTransitionEnd
props.description: Called when the indicator finishes transitioning to a new position

props.name: onTransitionStart
props.description: Called when the indicator starts transitioning to a new position

props.name: parent
props.description: Parent container element that must have position: relative. The indicator's position is calculated relative to this element.

props.name: target
props.description:
Target element over which the indicator is displayed.
The indicator will be positioned to match the target's size and position.
